rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §28.0211, which governs accelerated instruction and modified teacher assignment for students failing assessment instruments. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 28.0211. ACCELERATED INSTRUCTION; MODIFIED TEACHER ASSIGNMENT.
_note: Rule text concerns student assessment and accelerated instruction; proposed homestead exemption change is unrelated property tax policy. No conflict identified.
